description_long: This object is a bunch of Concord-style purple grapes, featuring numerous round, plump berries tightly clustered together in a conical formation. The grapes have a deep purplish hue with subtle variations in shading, giving them a natural, ripe appearance. Each grape is smooth and slightly glossy, with a semi-soft surface that reflects light gently. At the top of the bunch, a short, greenish-brown stem is visible, connecting the grapes and providing a naturalistic touch. The overall bunch is compact and dense, with the grapes arranged closely together, creating a sense of fullness and abundance. The surface of the grapes appears mostly opaque, with only minimal translucency at the edges where light hits.
description: A tightly packed bunch of deep purple grapes with a visible stem and smooth, slightly glossy skins. The grapes are conically arranged and appear ripe and plump.
description_view_0: This view shows the bunch from a slightly angled perspective, highlighting the dense clustering and the visible stem at the top.
description_view_1: This view presents the grapes from a more side-on angle, emphasizing the roundness and tight packing of the berries, with the stem partially visible.
description_view_2: This view is nearly front-facing, showing the conical shape and the even distribution of grapes, with the stem just peeking out at the top.
description_view_3: This view is similar to view 2 but from a slightly different angle, showing the compact arrangement and the stem at the top center.
attribute_clustering_pattern: random clusters with dense central grouping
